data.content: Implemented dynamic overview sizing in e9afe376: overview tabs now render only non-empty state groups, grid columns use scrollport width / (visible columns + 1) with 80-320px bounds, overview typography is reduced one notch, and state pills are smaller/wrappable. Verification passed: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. Browser checks: in-app Work Items 4 visible columns, 0 empty columns, 192px width; Terminated 3 columns at 241px; Gates 1 column clamped at 320px; label class includes whitespace-normal text-[9px]. Headless desktop/mobile overflow metrics stayed within viewport.
